technical_replicate: Each experiment was conducted in triplicate.
experimental_design: we treated H1299 and A549 cells
factor_value: we treated H1299 and A549 cells with trichostatin A (TSA, an inhibitor of histone deacetylase (HDAC) class I/II family deacetylases) and nicotinamide (NAM, an inhibitor of sirtuin (SIRT) family deacetylases)
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (H1299 and A549) and no fractionation.
